message:
feat(cache,ledger,trace): transform ordering cache key tests, extended ledger coverage, and trace lint fixes

Add cache key sensitivity tests for transform stack ordering/composition (frankenjax-oy3),
extended ledger tests for Bayesian posteriors, e-processes, conformal prediction, loss matrices,
and serialization roundtrips (frankenjax-o9j). Fix clippy approx_constant and rustfmt in fj-trace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
